C0B0E9R0PE0.label: product
C0B0E9R0PE0.instructions: Engineering channel. Tickets here are for the RECRUITER (recruiter platform) or CANDIDATE (candidate platform) Plane projects — pick by keyword as described above. Default tone: technical, terse, ship-oriented.

_template_marketing.label: marketing
_template_marketing.instructions: Replace this entry's key with the real Slack channel ID for #marketing. Marketing team channel — tickets relate to campaigns, landing pages, ad copy, blog posts, social. If you create Plane tickets here, prefix the title with the campaign name when known. Default tone: brand-aware, playful but precise.

_template_bd.label: bd
_template_bd.instructions: Business development channel. Tickets here usually relate to partnerships, lead pipeline, contracts, outbound. Default tone: direct, executive-summary friendly. If asked about deals or pipeline, ask for the specific account name to avoid generic answers.

_template_sales.label: sales
_template_sales.instructions: Sales channel. Tickets here are about prospect issues, pricing requests, demos, follow-ups. Always tag the prospect or company name in the title. Default tone: customer-empathic, no jargon.
